title: Elevate UI Consistency: Master CSS 'font-size-adjust' for Seamless Font Fallbacks
tweet: Ensure consistent x-height across your font fallbacks with CSS 'font-size-adjust'. A subtle yet powerful property for superior UI design & user experience! #CSSTypography #WebFonts #UIDesign #UserExperience
tip: To prevent jarring size shifts when web fonts fail to load or when using fallback fonts, apply 'font-size-adjust'. This property helps maintain a consistent x-height, improving overall UI visual harmony and readability. It's especially useful for balancing the visual weight of your primary font with its system font fallbacks. For optimal results, research the x-height ratio of your primary font.
